evals.prompt: 帮我写一个 README。项目叫 `json2toml`，是一个 Rust CLI 工具，能把 JSON 文件转成 TOML 格式...
evals.expected_output: 一个推销员风格的 README.md，含徽章行、快速安装、使用示例、对比表格、功能亮点
assertions: README has a one-line tagline describing what the tool does
README includes installation instructions
README has at least one runnable code example
README has a features/benefits section (not just technical spec)
README includes license information
README does NOT contain fabricated testimonials or fake data
Quickstart/setup appears before detailed API reference
Uses user-centered language ('you', 'your')
Has comparison with Python alternative
Includes performance benchmarks or speed comparison

evals.prompt: 帮我优化一下这个项目的 README。项目叫 `react-simple-table`，一个 React 表格组件...
evals.expected_output: 一个改写的 README.md，保持技术准确性但用推销员风格，含功能场景、对比、快速开始
assertions: README has a one-line tagline describing the component
README includes installation instructions
README has at least one runnable code example
README has a features/benefits section (not just technical spec)
README includes license information
README does NOT contain fabricated testimonials or fake data
Quickstart/setup appears before detailed API reference
Uses user-centered language ('你', 'your')
Has comparison with react-table
Significantly improved over the original 5-line README provided

evals.prompt: 我写了一个 Python 库叫 `pydataclean`，用于清洗 CSV 数据...
evals.expected_output: 一个从零写的 README.md，面向数据工程师，强调不手写 pandas 脚本的核心价值
assertions: README has a one-line tagline describing the library
README includes installation instructions
README has at least one runnable code example
README has a features/benefits section (not just technical spec)
README includes license information
README does NOT contain fabricated testimonials or fake data
Quickstart/setup appears before detailed API reference
Uses user-centered language ('you', 'your')
Has comparison with pandas
Has 'who this is for' / target audience section
